bio: Maya is a pop singer-songwriter based in Austin, TX. Her sound blends warm acoustic textures with modern pop production, and she's been writing since age 12. 'Long Gone' is her debut single under the VR-MERGE label.
notes: Test fixture for VR-MERGE Job 1 end-to-end flow. Use this record to drive onboarding -> upload -> mix -> distrokid -> first payout (period 2026-04, scheduled_for 2026-05-15T09:00:00.000Z) in staging.
